---
title: "Test Page"
subtitle: "Testing leaflet shortcode inputs and error-handling behaviour"
leaflet:
  # ── Valid maps ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  # Minimal: only center + zoom; height falls back to default (400px)
  t-minimal:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]

  # Basic: all three fundamental arguments
  t-basic:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"

  # Markers: every popup/tooltip combination
  t-markers:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 11
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - position: [59.33, 18.07]        # popup + tooltip
        popup: "<b>Stockholm</b><br>Capital city"
        tooltip: "Stockholm"
      - position: [59.35, 18.10]        # tooltip only
        tooltip: "Djurgården (tooltip only)"
      - position: [59.31, 18.05]        # popup only
        popup: "Södermalm (popup only)"
      - position: [59.28, 18.09]        # neither popup nor tooltip

  # Marker-only map: center is derived from the bounding-box midpoint of marker coordinates and zoom defaults to 13
  t-markers-auto-center:
    height: "360px"
    markers:
      - lat: 59.33
        lon: 18.07
        popup: "Stockholm"
      - lat: 59.35
        lon: 18.10
        popup: "Djurgården"
      - lat: 59.31
        lon: 18.05
        popup: "Södermalm"

  # Markers loaded from a TSV file via markers-file + separator
  t-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-sep: "\t"

  # Markers loaded from a CSV file (auto-detected by extension)
  t-markers-csv:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.csv"

  # Marker file only: center is derived from the bounding-box midpoint of marker coordinates and zoom defaults to 13
  t-markers-file-auto-center:
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-sep: "\t"

  # Markers loaded from semicolon-separated text file
  t-markers-semi-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt"
    markers-sep: ";"

  # Markers loaded from pipe-separated text file
  t-markers-pipe-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "360px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-pipe.txt"
    markers-sep: "|"

  # Icon markers: Font Awesome, icon-color, icon-size, icon-anchor
  t-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - lat: 48.8584
        lon: 2.2945
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 16
      - lat: 48.8606
        lon: 2.3376
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-building-columns"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 16
        icon-anchor: [12, 24]           # explicit anchor offset
      - lat: 48.853
        lon: 2.3499
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-church"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 16

  # Regression check: default Leaflet markers next to a Font Awesome icon marker
  t-default-vs-fonticon:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - lat: 51.505
        lon: -0.09
        popup: "Default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker"
      - lat: 51.51
        lon: -0.082
        popup: "Font Awesome marker"
        tooltip: "Font Awesome icon"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 20
      - lat: 51.5
        lon: -0.1
        popup: "Second default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker 2"

  # Font Awesome markers for icon-font compatibility testing
  t-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - lat: 41.9028
        lon: 12.4964
        popup: "<b>Roman Forum</b>"
        tooltip: "Forum"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
        icon-color: "#b04a2b"
        icon-size: 16
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.4922
        popup: "<b>Colosseum</b>"
        tooltip: "Colosseum"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
        icon-color: "#5c6f7b"
        icon-size: 16
      - lat: 41.8986
        lon: 12.4768
        popup: "<b>Piazza Navona</b>"
        tooltip: "Piazza Navona"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
        icon-color: "#2f7d32"
        icon-size: 16

  # Stress test: numerous Font Awesome icons
  t-fontawesome-dense:
    center: [41.90, 12.50]
    zoom: 13
    height: "430px"
    markers:
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.46
        popup: "house"
        tooltip: "house"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "#e63946"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.47
        popup: "tree"
        tooltip: "tree"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
        icon-color: "#f4a261"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.48
        popup: "church"
        tooltip: "church"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-church"
        icon-color: "#e9c46a"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.49
        popup: "landmark"
        tooltip: "landmark"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
        icon-color: "#2a9d8f"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.50
        popup: "torii-gate"
        tooltip: "torii-gate"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
        icon-color: "#457b9d"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.51
        popup: "building-columns"
        tooltip: "building-columns"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-building-columns"
        icon-color: "#1d3557"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.52
        popup: "car"
        tooltip: "car"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-car"
        icon-color: "#9b5de5"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.53
        popup: "bus"
        tooltip: "bus"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-bus"
        icon-color: "#f15bb5"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.54
        popup: "train"
        tooltip: "train"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-train"
        icon-color: "#00bbf9"
      - lat: 41.88
        lon: 12.55
        popup: "plane"
        tooltip: "plane"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-plane"
        icon-color: "#00f5d4"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.46
        popup: "ship"
        tooltip: "ship"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-ship"
        icon-color: "#ef476f"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.47
        popup: "bicycle"
        tooltip: "bicycle"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-bicycle"
        icon-color: "#ff7f51"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.48
        popup: "person-walking"
        tooltip: "person-walking"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-person-walking"
        icon-color: "#ffd166"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.49
        popup: "mountain"
        tooltip: "mountain"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-mountain"
        icon-color: "#06d6a0"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.50
        popup: "umbrella-beach"
        tooltip: "umbrella-beach"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-umbrella-beach"
        icon-color: "#118ab2"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.51
        popup: "sun"
        tooltip: "sun"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-sun"
        icon-color: "#073b4c"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.52
        popup: "moon"
        tooltip: "moon"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-moon"
        icon-color: "#8338ec"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.53
        popup: "cloud"
        tooltip: "cloud"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-cloud"
        icon-color: "#ff006e"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.54
        popup: "cloud-rain"
        tooltip: "cloud-rain"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-cloud-rain"
        icon-color: "#3a86ff"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.55
        popup: "snowflake"
        tooltip: "snowflake"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-snowflake"
        icon-color: "#43aa8b"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.46
        popup: "bolt"
        tooltip: "bolt"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-bolt"
        icon-color: "#f94144"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.47
        popup: "fire"
        tooltip: "fire"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-fire"
        icon-color: "#f3722c"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.48
        popup: "heart"
        tooltip: "heart"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-heart"
        icon-color: "#f8961e"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.49
        popup: "star"
        tooltip: "star"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-star"
        icon-color: "#f9844a"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.50
        popup: "bell"
        tooltip: "bell"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-bell"
        icon-color: "#f9c74f"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.51
        popup: "camera"
        tooltip: "camera"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-camera"
        icon-color: "#90be6d"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.52
        popup: "music"
        tooltip: "music"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-music"
        icon-color: "#43aa8b"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.53
        popup: "book"
        tooltip: "book"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-book"
        icon-color: "#4d908e"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.54
        popup: "graduation-cap"
        tooltip: "graduation-cap"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"
        icon-color: "#577590"
      - lat: 41.90
        lon: 12.55
        popup: "briefcase"
        tooltip: "briefcase"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-briefcase"
        icon-color: "#277da1"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.46
        popup: "flask"
        tooltip: "flask"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-flask"
        icon-color: "#d62828"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.47
        popup: "stethoscope"
        tooltip: "stethoscope"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-stethoscope"
        icon-color: "#f77f00"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.48
        popup: "syringe"
        tooltip: "syringe"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-syringe"
        icon-color: "#fcbf49"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.49
        popup: "pills"
        tooltip: "pills"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-pills"
        icon-color: "#eae2b7"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.50
        popup: "paw"
        tooltip: "paw"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-paw"
        icon-color: "#588157"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.51
        popup: "fish"
        tooltip: "fish"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-fish"
        icon-color: "#3a5a40"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.52
        popup: "leaf"
        tooltip: "leaf"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-leaf"
        icon-color: "#2d6a4f"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.53
        popup: "seedling"
        tooltip: "seedling"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-seedling"
        icon-color: "#40916c"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.54
        popup: "apple-whole"
        tooltip: "apple-whole"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-apple-whole"
        icon-color: "#52b788"
      - lat: 41.91
        lon: 12.55
        popup: "pizza-slice"
        tooltip: "pizza-slice"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-pizza-slice"
        icon-color: "#74c69d"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.46
        popup: "mug-hot"
        tooltip: "mug-hot"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-mug-hot"
        icon-color: "#bc4749"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.47
        popup: "ice-cream"
        tooltip: "ice-cream"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-ice-cream"
        icon-color: "#dda15e"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.48
        popup: "gamepad"
        tooltip: "gamepad"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-gamepad"
        icon-color: "#6d597a"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.49
        popup: "football"
        tooltip: "football"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-football"
        icon-color: "#b56576"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.50
        popup: "dumbbell"
        tooltip: "dumbbell"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-dumbbell"
        icon-color: "#e56b6f"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.51
        popup: "wrench"
        tooltip: "wrench"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-wrench"
        icon-color: "#eaac8b"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.52
        popup: "hammer"
        tooltip: "hammer"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-hammer"
        icon-color: "#355070"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.53
        popup: "screwdriver-wrench"
        tooltip: "screwdriver-wrench"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-screwdriver-wrench"
        icon-color: "#6d597a"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.54
        popup: "key"
        tooltip: "key"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-key"
        icon-color: "#b56576"
      - lat: 41.92
        lon: 12.55
        popup: "lock"
        tooltip: "lock"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-lock"
        icon-color: "#e56b6f"

  # Custom image icon via URL
  t-image-icon:
    center: [51.5, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - lat: 51.5
        lon: -0.09
        popup: "Custom image icon"
        icon:
          url: "https://leafletjs.com/examples/custom-icons/leaf-green.png"
          size: [38, 95]
          anchor: [22, 94]
      - lat: 51.505
        lon: -0.07
        popup: "Default blue marker alongside custom icon"

  # Custom tile layer (CartoDB dark_all)
  t-tile-dark:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 11
    height: "380px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 20
    markers:
      - lat: 40.7128
        lon: -74.006
        popup: "<b>New York City</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "#ff6b6b"
        icon-size: 20

  # Custom tile layer (CartoDB Voyager)
  t-tile-voyager:
    center: [35.68, 139.69]
    zoom: 12
    height: "340px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 19

  # Passthrough Leaflet L.map() options
  t-passthrough:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 14
    height: "340px"
    zoomControl: false
    scrollWheelZoom: false
    dragging: true
    doubleClickZoom: false
    keyboard: false
    minZoom: 10
    maxZoom: 18

  # Extended passthrough coverage for L.map() options listed in README
  t-passthrough-all:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    zoomControl: true
    attributionControl: true
    closePopupOnClick: true
    minZoom: 3
    maxZoom: 18
    zoomSnap: 0.5
    zoomDelta: 0.5
    trackResize: true
    boxZoom: true
    doubleClickZoom: "center"
    dragging: true
    scrollWheelZoom: "center"
    inertia: true
    inertiaDeceleration: 3200
    inertiaMaxSpeed: 1400
    easeLinearity: 0.2
    worldCopyJump: false
    maxBoundsViscosity: 0.5
    keyboard: true
    keyboardPanDelta: 80
    wheelDebounceTime: 40
    wheelPxPerZoomLevel: 60
    touchZoom: "center"
    bounceAtZoomLimits: true
    tapHold: true
    tapTolerance: 15
    zoomAnimation: true
    zoomAnimationThreshold: 4
    fadeAnimation: true
    markerZoomAnimation: true
    transform3DLimit: 8388608
    preferCanvas: false

  # Extended passthrough coverage for L.tileLayer() options listed in README
  t-tile-all-options:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 11
    height: "340px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors"
      minZoom: 0
      maxZoom: 19
      minNativeZoom: 0
      maxNativeZoom: 19
      subdomains: "abc"
      errorTileUrl: "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/0/0/0.png"
      zoomOffset: 0
      tms: false
      zoomReverse: false
      detectRetina: false
      crossOrigin: "anonymous"
      referrerPolicy: "no-referrer"
      opacity: 0.95
      zIndex: 1
      className: "ql-test-tile"
      pane: "tilePane"
      tileSize: 256
      updateWhenIdle: false
      updateWhenZooming: true
      updateInterval: 200
      keepBuffer: 2
      noWrap: false

  # ── Error-case maps (used to test graceful degradation) ─────────────────────

  # Markers list with intentionally bad entries mixed with valid ones
  t-bad-markers:
    center: [0.0, 0.0]
    zoom: 2
    height: "300px"
    markers:
      - popup: "No position key — silently skipped"
      - lat: 51.5
        lon: -0.1
        popup: "Valid marker — should appear"
      - position: "not-a-list"          # scalar string, not [lat, lon]
        popup: "Invalid position type — silently skipped"
      - position: [200.0, 400.0]        # out-of-range coords (Leaflet JS handles)
        popup: "Out-of-range coords — Leaflet handles gracefully"
      - lat: 0.0
        lon: 0.0
        popup: "Valid marker at origin"

  # tile sub-key provided as a boolean (not a sub-table) — ignored safely
  t-tile-bool:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 12
    height: "300px"
    tile: true                          # invalid type: should fall back to default OSM tile

format:
  html:
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: true
---

This page exercises various arguments and features of the `leaflet` shortcode extension, including a suite of error cases.
For error cases the extension must **never crash** — it must either render a visible error message or silently skip the bad input and continue rendering.

::: {.callout-note}
All tests are run in the HTML output format.
:::

## YAML-based maps

### Minimal — center only

Default height (`400px`) is used when `height` is omitted.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-minimal:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
```

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-minimal >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-minimal >}}

### Basic — center, zoom, height

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-basic:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
```

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-basic >}}

### Markers — all popup/tooltip combinations

Tests four markers:

| Marker | popup | tooltip |
|--------|-------|---------|
| Stockholm | ✓ | ✓ |
| Djurgården | — | ✓ |
| Södermalm | ✓ | — |
| Unnamed point | — | — |

{{< leaflet t-markers >}}

### Markers from TSV (markers-file + separator)

Loads markers from `data/stockholm-markers.tsv` using `lat`/`lon`, `popup`,
`tooltip`, and icon columns.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-sep: "\t"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-tab >}}

### Markers from CSV

Loads markers from `data/stockholm-markers.csv` using the generic
`markers-file` option.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-csv:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.csv"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-csv >}}

### Markers from semicolon-separated .txt

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-semi-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt"
    markers-sep: ";"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-semi-txt >}}

### Markers from pipe-separated .txt

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-markers-pipe-txt:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers-pipe.txt"
    markers-sep: "|"
```

{{< leaflet t-markers-pipe-txt >}}

### Icon markers — Font Awesome

Tests `icon`, `icon-color`, `icon-size`, and `icon-anchor`.

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  t-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "380px"
    markers:
      - lat: 48.8584
        lon: 2.2945
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 16
      - lat: 48.8606
        lon: 2.3376
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-building-columns"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 16
        icon-anchor: [12, 24]           # explicit anchor offset
      - lat: 48.853
        lon: 2.3499
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-church"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 16
---

{{{< leaflet t-icons >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-icons >}}

### Default markers and Font Awesome icons together

This map exists to catch the packaging bug where default Leaflet markers disappear while Font Awesome icon markers still render. All three markers below must be visible at the same time.

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  t-default-vs-fonticon:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - lat: 51.505
        lon: -0.09
        popup: "Default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker"
      - lat: 51.51
        lon: -0.082
        popup: "Font Awesome marker"
        tooltip: "Font Awesome icon"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 20
      - lat: 51.5
        lon: -0.1
        popup: "Second default Leaflet marker"
        tooltip: "Default marker 2"
---
{{{< leaflet t-default-vs-fonticon >}}}
```

{{< leaflet t-default-vs-fonticon >}}

### FontAwesome markers

These icon-font markers render without extra page setup because the extension loads Font Awesome automatically.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    markers:
      - lat: 41.9028
        lon: 12.4964
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.4922
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
      - lat: 41.8986
        lon: 12.4768
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
```

{{< leaflet t-fontawesome >}}

### FontAwesome dense markers

Stress test with 50 markers and 50 different Font Awesome icon classes.

{{< leaflet t-fontawesome-dense >}}

### Custom image icon

The first marker uses a remote PNG via `icon: {url: ..., size: [...], anchor: [...]}`.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-image-icon:
    center: [51.5, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "340px"
    markers:
      - lat: 51.5
        lon: -0.09
        popup: "Custom image icon"
        icon:
          url: "https://leafletjs.com/examples/custom-icons/leaf-green.png"
          size: [38, 95]
          anchor: [22, 94]
      - lat: 51.505
        lon: -0.07
        popup: "Default blue marker alongside custom icon"
```

{{< leaflet t-image-icon >}}

### Custom tile layer — CartoDB dark

Tests the `tile` sub-object with `url`, `attribution`, `subdomains`, and `maxZoom`.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-tile-dark:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 11
    height: "380px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 20
    markers:
      - lat: 40.7128
        lon: -74.006
        popup: "<b>New York City</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-house"
        icon-color: "#ff6b6b"
        icon-size: 20
```

{{< leaflet t-tile-dark >}}

### Custom tile layer — CartoDB Voyager

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-tile-voyager:
    center: [35.68, 139.69]
    zoom: 12
    height: "340px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/rastertiles/voyager/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors &copy; CARTO"
      subdomains: "abcd"
      maxZoom: 19
```

{{< leaflet t-tile-voyager >}}

### Passthrough Leaflet options

Passes `zoomControl`, `scrollWheelZoom`, `dragging`, `doubleClickZoom`,
`keyboard`, `minZoom`, and `maxZoom` directly to `L.map()`.
Scroll-wheel zoom and double-click zoom are disabled; dragging is on.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-passthrough:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 14
    height: "340px"
    zoomControl: false
    scrollWheelZoom: false
    dragging: true
    doubleClickZoom: false
    keyboard: false
    minZoom: 10
    maxZoom: 18
```

{{< leaflet t-passthrough >}}

### Passthrough Leaflet options — full map option set

Exercises the remaining top-level `L.map()` options listed in README,
including mixed-type options like `doubleClickZoom`, `scrollWheelZoom`, and
`touchZoom` with the string value `"center"`.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-passthrough-all:
      center: [40.7128, -74.006]
      zoom: 13
      height: "340px"
      zoomControl: true
      attributionControl: true
      closePopupOnClick: true
      minZoom: 3
      maxZoom: 18
      zoomSnap: 0.5
      zoomDelta: 0.5
      trackResize: true
      boxZoom: true
      doubleClickZoom: "center"
      dragging: true
      scrollWheelZoom: "center"
      inertia: true
      inertiaDeceleration: 3200
      inertiaMaxSpeed: 1400
      easeLinearity: 0.2
      worldCopyJump: false
      maxBoundsViscosity: 0.5
      keyboard: true
      keyboardPanDelta: 80
      wheelDebounceTime: 40
      wheelPxPerZoomLevel: 60
      touchZoom: "center"
      bounceAtZoomLimits: true
      tapHold: true
      tapTolerance: 15
      zoomAnimation: true
      zoomAnimationThreshold: 4
      fadeAnimation: true
      markerZoomAnimation: true
      transform3DLimit: 8388608
      preferCanvas: false
```

{{< leaflet t-passthrough-all >}}

### Custom tile layer — all listed tile options

Exercises all listed `tile` sub-options from README in a single map config.

```yaml
leaflet:
  t-tile-all-options:
    center: [40.7128, -74.006]
    zoom: 11
    height: "340px"
    tile:
      url: "https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png"
      attribution: "&copy; <a href='https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright'>OpenStreetMap</a> contributors"
      minZoom: 0
      maxZoom: 19
      minNativeZoom: 0
      maxNativeZoom: 19
      subdomains: "abc"
      errorTileUrl: "https://tile.openstreetmap.org/0/0/0.png"
      zoomOffset: 0
      tms: false
      zoomReverse: false
      detectRetina: false
      crossOrigin: "anonymous"
      referrerPolicy: "no-referrer"
      opacity: 0.95
      zIndex: 1
      className: "ql-test-tile"
      pane: "tilePane"
      tileSize: 256
      updateWhenIdle: false
      updateWhenZooming: true
      updateInterval: 200
      keepBuffer: 2
      noWrap: false
```

{{< leaflet t-tile-all-options >}}

## Inline shortcode maps

### Minimal inline — center + zoom

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 >}}

### Inline with explicit height

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="320px" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="320px" >}}

### Inline with passthrough options

`scrollWheelZoom` and `zoomControl` passed inline.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom=false zoomControl=false >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom=false zoomControl=false >}}

### Inline passthrough with string-valued options

Checks that case-sensitive string values are preserved inline (for options that
accept string forms in Leaflet).

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom="center" touchZoom="center" doubleClickZoom="center" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=11 height="320px" scrollWheelZoom="center" touchZoom="center" doubleClickZoom="center" >}}

### Inline custom tile JSON

Checks inline `tile` JSON object parsing.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[40.7128, -74.006]" zoom=11 height="320px" tile='{"url":"https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png","attribution":"&copy; OpenStreetMap"}' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[40.7128, -74.006]" zoom=11 height="320px" tile='{"url":"https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png","attribution":"&copy; OpenStreetMap"}' >}}

### Inline custom tile JSON (single-item array wrapper)

Checks backward-compatible parsing of `tile` as a one-element JSON array.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[40.7128, -74.006]" zoom=11 height="320px" tile='[{"url":"https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png","attribution":"&copy; OpenStreetMap"}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[40.7128, -74.006]" zoom=11 height="320px" tile='[{"url":"https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png","attribution":"&copy; OpenStreetMap"}]' >}}

### Inline with JSON markers

Markers are supplied as a JSON string.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px"
    markers='[{"lat":59.33,"lon":18.07,"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"lat":59.35,"lon":18.10,"popup":"Djurgården"},{"lat":59.31,"lon":18.05,"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers='[{"lat":59.33,"lon":18.07,"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"lat":59.35,"lon":18.10,"popup":"Djurgården"},{"lat":59.31,"lon":18.05,"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}

### Inline with TSV markers (markers-file + separator)

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.tsv" markers-sep="\t" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.tsv" markers-sep="\t" >}}

### Inline with CSV markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.csv" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers.csv" >}}

### Inline with semicolon-separated .txt markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-sep=";" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="320px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-sep=";" >}}

### Multiple inline maps on the same page

Each map must receive a unique HTML `id` and JS variable name.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=10 height="260px" >}}}
{{{< leaflet center="[-33.87, 151.21]" zoom=11 height="260px" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[35.68, 139.69]" zoom=10 height="260px" >}}

{{< leaflet center="[-33.87, 151.21]" zoom=11 height="260px" >}}

### Inline Font Awesome icons

This checks inline JSON markers using Font Awesome classes.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[41.9028, 12.4964]" zoom=13 height="320px"
  markers='[{"lat":41.9028,"lon":12.4964,"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.89,"lon":12.4922,"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.8986,"lon":12.4768,"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":20}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[41.9028, 12.4964]" zoom=13 height="320px" markers='[{"lat":41.9028,"lon":12.4964,"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.89,"lon":12.4922,"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.8986,"lon":12.4768,"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":20}]' >}}

## Error handling

All cases below **must not crash** Quarto rendering. The extension either emits a
visible error notice or silently skips the offending input.

### No arguments whatsoever

With no `center` and no usable marker coordinates, the extension must report
the error without crashing.

```lua
{{{< leaflet >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet >}}

### Named label that does not exist in metadata

```lua
{{{< leaflet no-such-map >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `map 'no-such-map' not found in metadata`

{{< leaflet no-such-map >}}

### Invalid center — no brackets

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="51.505,-0.09" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (no marker coordinates are available to derive it)

{{< leaflet center="51.505,-0.09" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — only one coordinate

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (no marker coordinates are available to derive it)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — non-numeric values

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[abc, xyz]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (no marker coordinates are available to derive it)

{{< leaflet center="[abc, xyz]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — empty brackets

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (no marker coordinates are available to derive it)

{{< leaflet center="[]" zoom=13 >}}

### Invalid center — too many coordinates

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.5, -0.09, 100]" zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (parser requires exactly 2 values and no marker coordinates are available)

{{< leaflet center="[51.5, -0.09, 100]" zoom=13 >}}

### Zoom as non-numeric string

`zoom` is invalid (`tonumber` returns nil); the shortcode falls back to `13`.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom="very-high" height="300px" >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders with zoom level `13`

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom="very-high" height="300px" >}}

### Inline markers without center

Center is derived from the midpoint of the bounding box of the marker coordinates.

```lua
{{< leaflet zoom=13 height="320px"
  markers='[{"lat":41.9028,"lon":12.4964,"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.89,"lon":12.4922,"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.8986,"lon":12.4768,"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":20}]' >}}
```

**Expected:** map renders and auto-centers on the marker centroid

{{< leaflet zoom=13 height="320px"
  markers='[{"lat":41.9028,"lon":12.4964,"popup":"<b>Roman Forum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-landmark","icon-color":"#b04a2b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.89,"lon":12.4922,"popup":"<b>Colosseum</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-torii-gate","icon-color":"#5c6f7b","icon-size":20},{"lat":41.8986,"lon":12.4768,"popup":"<b>Piazza Navona</b>","icon":"fa-solid fa-tree","icon-color":"#2f7d32","icon-size":20}]' >}}

### YAML markers without center or zoom

Both values are derived from defaults: center from the marker centroid, zoom from the shortcode default.

**Expected:** map renders centered on the three markers at zoom `13`

{{< leaflet t-markers-auto-center >}}

### Marker file without center or zoom

The shortcode derives `center` from the file coordinates and uses zoom `13`.

**Expected:** map renders with TSV markers, auto-centered at zoom `13`

{{< leaflet t-markers-file-auto-center >}}

### Invalid JSON for inline markers

Markers are silently dropped; the map still renders.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers="not-json-at-all" >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders without markers

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers="not-json-at-all" >}}

### Inline markers JSON — wrong root type (not an array)

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='{"lat":51.5,"lon":-0.1,"popup":"object not array"}' >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders without markers (JSON object instead of array is ignored)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='{"lat":51.5,"lon":-0.1,"popup":"object not array"}' >}}

### Inline marker with missing position in JSON array

The marker without `position` is silently skipped; valid markers are added.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px"
    markers='[{"popup":"no position"},{"lat":51.5,"lon":-0.1,"popup":"valid marker"}]' >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders with one marker (lat 51.5, lon -0.1)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="300px" markers='[{"popup":"no position"},{"lat":51.5,"lon":-0.1,"popup":"valid marker"}]' >}}

### YAML map with bad marker entries mixed with valid ones

Uses the `t-bad-markers` YAML map (defined in frontmatter) which includes:

- A marker with no `position` key → skipped
- A marker with `position: "not-a-list"` → skipped
- Two valid markers → rendered

**Expected:** map renders with 3 visible markers (valid + out-of-range as Leaflet handles it)

{{< leaflet t-bad-markers >}}

### YAML `tile` given as a boolean, not a sub-table

Uses the `t-tile-bool` YAML map where `tile: true` instead of a sub-object.

**Expected:** map renders using the default OpenStreetMap tile layer

{{< leaflet t-tile-bool >}}

### Unknown / extra kwargs (passthrough)

Unrecognised kwargs are forwarded to `L.map()` as options. Leaflet ignores
unrecognised options, so no error should occur.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="280px" unknownOption="foo" anotherFake=42 >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders normally (unknown options are ignored by Leaflet)

{{< leaflet center="[51.505, -0.09]" zoom=13 height="280px" unknownOption="foo" anotherFake=42 >}}

### Wrong separator for markers-file

The file exists, but `markers-sep` is intentionally wrong.
Rows should fail to parse into valid marker coordinates, while the map itself
still renders without crashing.

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="300px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-sep="," >}}}
```

**Expected:** map renders, but no markers are added.

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="300px" markers-file="data/stockholm-markers-semicolon.txt" markers-sep="," >}}

### Multiple positional args (not a valid named-label call)

When more than one positional arg is given, the shortcode falls through to
kwargs mode.  With no `center` kwarg the extension must report the missing
argument because there are still no marker coordinates to derive it.

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic extra-arg >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required`

{{< leaflet t-basic extra-arg >}}

### Named label call with extra kwargs (kwargs win)

When both a positional label *and* kwargs are present, the code switches to
kwargs mode and the label is ignored. With no `center` kwarg the shortcode
reports the error because there are no marker coordinates in kwargs.

```lua
{{{< leaflet t-basic zoom=13 >}}}
```

**Expected:** visible error — `'center' is required` (label is ignored; `center` kwarg and marker coordinates are absent)

{{< leaflet t-basic zoom=13 >}}
